title: apium nodiflorum subsp. repens
intro: Apium nodiflorum subsp. repens, also known as Creeping Water Parsnip or Repens Water Parsnip, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Apium nodiflorum subsp. repens include its ability to help reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and support digestive health. Apium nodiflorum subsp. repens can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal herb.
